village.label: Village
descriptions: A handful of thatched-roof cottages cluster around a muddy crossroads. Chickens roam freely between vegetable gardens.
Smoke curls from stone chimneys as villagers tend their fields. A weathered signpost points toward the nearest town.
This small settlement sits beside a shallow creek. Children play among stacked firewood while elders mend fishing nets.
A circle of sturdy timber buildings surrounds a mossy well. The smell of baking bread drifts from an open window.
Goats graze on the hillside above this cluster of homes. A blacksmith's hammer rings out in steady rhythm.
Log cabins line a packed-earth road. A shrine to a forgotten god stands at the village edge, draped in wildflowers.
The village sits in the shadow of ancient oaks. Lanterns hang from iron hooks, ready for the coming dusk.
Farmsteads spread along a gentle valley. A communal barn dominates the center, its doors wide open at harvest time.
Muddy cart tracks converge at a sagging wooden bridge. A dog barks from a rooftop while geese waddle along the road.
Stone foundations and wattle walls lean against one another for support. A thin plume of peat smoke marks the village from miles away.
A ring of standing stones watches over this settlement from the hilltop. The villagers leave offerings there on moonless nights.
Drying racks of fish line the lakeshore. The houses here are built on stilts, connected by creaking boardwalks.
Wildflowers push through the cobbles of the tiny square. A bent old woman tends the communal herb garden, humming a tune.
Two rows of houses face each other across a ditch that doubles as a drain. Laundry hangs between the upper floors.
The settlement clings to the base of a cliff. Caves behind the houses serve as root cellars and storm shelters.
Apple orchards surround this hamlet on three sides. Cider-press season brings a sweet, heady scent to every corner.
A watchtower converted into a grain silo dominates the village. Its bell still rings when danger approaches.
Beehives line the fence around the village common. The local honey is famous enough to attract traders from afar.
A crumbling aqueduct from a forgotten age runs through the settlement, still carrying clear water from the hills.
The village straddles a shallow ford. Wagon wheels have worn deep ruts in the riverbed from generations of crossing.

town.label: Town
descriptions: Timber and stone buildings line cobblestone streets. A market square buzzes with merchants hawking their wares.
Sturdy walls encircle this settlement. Guards patrol the gates, checking the papers of arriving merchants.
The town sits at a major crossroads, drawing travelers from every direction. Inns and taverns line the main thoroughfare.
Church bells mark the hours as townsfolk go about their business. A militia drills in the square each morning.
Half-timbered buildings lean over narrow streets. The smell of tanned leather and forge smoke fills the air.
A stone bridge spans the river at the town's heart. Boats crowd the docks, loading grain and timber for distant markets.
Banners fly from the town hall as merchants argue prices in the covered market. The streets are alive with commerce.
Watchtowers rise above slate rooftops. The town has weathered raids before and stands ready for the next.
Ox carts queue at the gatehouse while a tax collector argues with a fur trader. The streets inside smell of sawdust and iron.
Washing lines crisscross the alley above the tannery district. Apprentices haul buckets of water from the central fountain.
A clocktower with a cracked face overlooks the market. Locals claim it hasn't kept accurate time in thirty years, but nobody minds.
Scaffolding covers the eastern wall where masons work to repair damage from a recent storm. The town is growing despite itself.
The old quarter's narrow lanes give way to a newer district of wide avenues and whitewashed facades. Two eras live side by side.
Fishmongers shout prices at the dawn market while bakers slide trays of rolls into brick ovens. The town wakes hungry.
A statue of a forgotten hero stands in the main square, one arm missing. Pigeons roost where the sword once pointed.
Canal boats glide beneath arched stone bridges, delivering barrels of ale and bundles of wool to the warehouses.
The town sits inside the ruins of a much larger fortification. Ancient walls dwarf the buildings that shelter within them.
A yearly horse fair has just ended, leaving trampled fields and the lingering smell of roasted chestnuts.
Ivy crawls over the town walls, softening their silhouette. Guards lean on their spears and watch the road with lazy eyes.
Three competing inns face the town square, each with a larger signboard than the last. The rivalry is the talk of every traveler.

city.label: City
descriptions: Massive walls enclose districts of varied character. Spires and domes punctuate a skyline thick with chimney smoke.
The city sprawls across both banks of a great river, connected by stone bridges. Thousands call these streets home.
Towering gates open onto broad avenues lined with merchant houses, guild halls, and temples to a dozen faiths.
The city rises in tiers from the harbor to the citadel. Each level tells the story of a different era.
Narrow alleys wind between ancient stone buildings. Street vendors, beggars, and nobles all jostle for space.
Great walls guard a city famous for its artisans and scholars. Universities and workshops share every block.
The city's markets draw traders from across the known world. Exotic goods fill warehouses along the waterfront.
A sprawling metropolis that never truly sleeps. Lantern-lit streets echo with music, argument, and commerce at all hours.
Aqueducts arch above the rooftops, carrying mountain water to marble fountains in every district. The stonework is ancient beyond memory.
Smoke from a hundred forges darkens the sky over the craftsmen's quarter. The noble district upwind gleams white by contrast.
A great coliseum dominates the city center, its tiers able to seat thousands. Contests of blade and spell draw crowds year-round.
Canals lace through the lower city, choked with gondolas and flat-bottomed barges. Bridges of every style link the islands together.
The city clings to a mountainside, its streets switchbacking between terraced levels connected by steep stairways and cargo lifts.
An enormous lighthouse crowns the harbor breakwater, visible for leagues at sea. The docks never rest — ships arrive at every tide.
Gargoyles watch from every cornice in the old quarter. Locals say the stonecutters' guild placed them there to ward off evil spirits.
Sewer grates breathe warm, foul air into the streets. Beneath the city runs a labyrinth older than the walls above.
The palace complex alone could house a small town. Its gilded domes and hanging gardens are visible from every rooftop.
Printing presses clatter in the scholar's district, churning out broadsheets and pamphlets. Literacy is both prized and dangerous here.
A vast cemetery lies within the city walls, its crypts and mausoleums forming a silent district of their own. Grave wardens patrol at dusk.
Rope bridges and wooden walkways connect the upper stories of buildings in the poorest quarter, creating a second city above the streets.

tall and thin with sharp features
broad-shouldered with a thick beard
a scarred face and knowing eyes
neat clothing and polished boots
flour-dusted apron and rolled sleeves
a crooked nose and easy smile
greying temples and wire spectacles
sun-weathered skin and strong arms
a limp from an old injury
bright eyes and an infectious grin
ink-stained fingers and rumpled hair
a patch over one eye
muscular arms covered in old burns
a round face and rosy cheeks

a booming voice that carries across any room

heavy-set with surprisingly light footsteps

purposes: seeking to awaken a slumbering entity beneath the earth
collecting forbidden texts from across the realm
infiltrating positions of power through blackmail and charm
performing blood rituals to extend the life of their leader
plotting to open a gateway to another plane
hoarding magical artifacts for an unknown purpose
patrolling the roads and keeping bandits at bay
guarding the settlement against monster incursions
training townsfolk for militia duty in times of need
hunting down a notorious outlaw gang operating nearby
maintaining order during a tense political dispute
controlling the black market and smuggling routes
running a protection racket on local merchants
counterfeiting coins and flooding the local economy
assassinating political rivals for wealthy patrons
operating a network of spies and informants

questHooks: A merchant's caravan carrying {goods} went missing on the road to {location}. Someone must investigate.
Strange lights have been seen near {location} at night. The townsfolk fear {monster} may be involved.
The local well has gone dry. {npc} believes something is blocking the underground spring near {location}.
{npc} is offering a reward for anyone who can retrieve a family heirloom stolen by bandits hiding near {location}.
Livestock have been disappearing from farms outside town. Tracks suggest {monster} is responsible.
A traveling scholar claims {location} holds the entrance to an ancient vault filled with {goods}.
Miners refuse to return to work after encountering {monster} deep in the tunnels near {location}.
{npc} needs an escort to deliver {goods} to a buyer in a dangerous part of the region.
Children have gone missing near {location}. Some blame {monster}, others whisper of a more sinister cause.
A bounty has been posted for the head of {monster}, last spotted near {location}.
The remains of an adventuring party were found near {location}. Their map and journal are still missing.
{npc} seeks brave souls to clear {monster} from the ruins at {location} before a new trade route can open.
A sealed letter was found on a dead courier, addressed to {npc}. It mentions {goods} hidden near {location}.
The local temple's sacred relic was stolen during the night. Witnesses saw figures fleeing toward {location}.
Fishermen pulled a strange artifact from the river near {location}. Since then, {monster} has appeared nightly.
A noble is offering a fortune for {goods} said to be found only in the wilds near {location}.
A refugee stumbled into town raving about {monster} overrunning a homestead near {location}. No one else has dared to check.
The bridge near {location} collapsed under mysterious circumstances. {npc} suspects sabotage and wants proof.
Grave robbers have been seen near {location}. The dead aren't staying buried, and {monster} has been spotted at the site.
{npc} claims a stash of {goods} was buried near {location} by a now-dead relative. The map is crude but readable.
A woodcutter's family hasn't been heard from in two weeks. Their cabin lies near {location}, deep in {monster} territory.
Smoke has been rising from {location} for three days straight. The last patrol sent to investigate never returned.
A merchant is paying well for {goods}, but the only reliable source is near {location} — and {monster} guards the approach.
A wandering priest warns that {monster} is being drawn to {location} by some dark ritual. He begs someone to intervene.
{npc} lost a prized racing horse that bolted toward {location}. Will pay handsomely for its safe return.
An old map found in the library marks {location} as the site of a forgotten armory stocked with {goods}.
The miller's daughter eloped with a soldier and was last seen heading toward {location}. {npc} wants them found before winter.
Taxcollectors traveling to {location} were robbed. The crown wants the stolen {goods} recovered and the thieves identified.
Howling is heard every night from the direction of {location}. Hunters say the tracks don't match any known animal, but resemble {monster}.
A tinker passing through claims to have seen {monster} dragging something heavy into a cave near {location}.
The ferry at {location} has stopped running. The ferryman sent word that something in the water destroyed his boat.
A sealed tomb near {location} has cracked open on its own. {npc} fears what may have crawled out — or what was let in.
shopQuestTemplates: A {item} is lost (or so claimed). Secret: This is actually {secret} and it is currently somewhere near {hexRef}. Finder's reward is {reward}.
A shipment of goods was intercepted by bandits near {hexRef}. Retrieve the cargo and the reward is {reward}.
Needs someone to deliver {goods} to a contact near {hexRef}. Payment on delivery: {reward}.
A regular supplier has gone missing somewhere near {hexRef}. Find out what happened. Will pay {reward} for answers.
Has heard rumors of rare materials near {hexRef}. Willing to pay {reward} for a sample.
A rival merchant near {hexRef} has been undercutting prices with stolen goods. Investigate discreetly for {reward}.
An old debt needs collecting from someone last seen near {hexRef}. The debtor owes {reward} — keep half as payment.
A previous customer vanished while traveling near {hexRef}. Their family is offering {reward} for information.
questSecrets: a Wand of Magic Missiles (7 charges)
a +1 Shield that glows near goblins
a cursed blade that whispers at night
a map to a hidden treasure vault
a holy relic worth ten times the reward
a letter implicating the local ruler

criminal: is covering up a crime committed by
